coverage_note: The bundled CFTR population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from CFTR ATP-regulated chloride and bicarbonate channel function, epithelial fluid balance, mucus hydration, and ABC transporter folding/trafficking and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000001626: CFTR coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: CFTR findings should be read against ATP-regulated chloride and bicarbonate channel function, epithelial fluid balance, mucus hydration, and ABC transporter folding/trafficking; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

CFTR p.Phe508del / F508del is curated as a CFTR marker for Cystic fibrosis and CFTR-related disorder context, Epithelial chloride/bicarbonate transport; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

CFTR gating-variant model is curated as a CFTR marker for Cystic fibrosis and CFTR-related disorder context, Epithelial chloride/bicarbonate transport; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
